recommendations.title: Cinco de Mayo: The Battle
recommendations.overview: On May 5th, 1862, a few thousand Mexican soldiers put their lives on the line against the world's largest and most powerful army in one legendary battle for freedom and for Mexico.

recommendations.title: Midway
recommendations.overview: The story of the Battle of Midway, and the leaders and soldiers who used their instincts, fortitude and bravery to overcome massive odds.

recommendations.title: The Mountain
recommendations.overview: The heroic story of two soldiers trapped in an ambush, fighting for their lives.

recommendations.title: Kalashnikov AK-47
recommendations.overview: A Russian military propaganda film about the tank commander Kalashnikov, severely injured in battle in 1941. The accident leaves him incapacitated and unable to return to the front line. While recovering in the hospital, he begins creating the initia

recommendations.title: Gold
recommendations.overview: Spanish soldiers battle indigenous tribes and their own brutal natures as they search for a legendary city built of gold.

recommendations.title: Shershaah
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the life of Captain Vikram Batra (PVC), the film celebrates his bravery, valiant spirit and honors his invaluable sacrifice during the Kargil War of 1999, at the age of 24.

recommendations.title: Stalingrad
recommendations.overview: A German Platoon is explored through the brutal fighting of the Battle of Stalingrad. After half of their number is wiped out and they're placed under the command of a sadistic captain, the platoon lieutenant leads his men to desert. The platoon memb

recommendations.title: Panfilov's 28 Men
recommendations.overview: USSR, November, 1941. Based on the account by Vasiliy Koroteev this is the story of Panifilov's Twenty-Eight, a group of twenty-eight Red Army soldiers commanded by General Ivan Panfilov, that stopped the advance on Moscow of a column of fifty-four N

recommendations.title: Outlaws - For Greater Glory
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the Cristeros War (1926-1929), which was touched off by a rebellion against the Mexican government's attempt to secularize the country.

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.
